problem_statement:
Check Balanced Parentheses. Given string str containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', check if the input string is valid and return true if the string is balanced otherwise return false.
 .

examples.explanation:
As every open bracket has its corresponding close bracket. Match parentheses are in correct order hence they are balanced.


Example 2:
As ГўВҖВҳ[ГўВҖВҳ does not have ГўВҖВҳ]ГўВҖВҷ hence it is not valid and will return false.
